title: Khouribga, Béni Mellal-Khénifra — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Khouribga is a city in Béni Mellal-Khénifra with a population of 196,000. A mining city known as the phosphate capital of the world, with a strong industrial economy.
